tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS Project
tool_args.raw_text: Transform Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street where: Buses operate quickly and reliably; Bus customers safely and easily access bus stations; Pedestrians are comfortable walking on and crossing the street; Drivers get where they need to go at a reasonable and safe speed

payload.description: Transform Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street with main road bus lanes, median stations, offset bus lanes, and bus bulbs

tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor - Based on the Q52/53 LTD bus route - 14 miles from Woodside to the Rockaways

payload.street: Woodhaven Boulevard and Cross Bay Boulevard
payload.description: 14-mile corridor along Woodhaven Blvd and Cross Bay Blvd from Woodside to the Rockaways

tool_args.label: Concept 2 selected - Main Road Bus Lanes
tool_args.raw_text: Concept 2 Main Road Bus Lanes - Substantial transit improvement - Most potential for pedestrian and safety improvements - Balances local vehicle access and thru vehicle traffic

payload.claim_text: Concept 2: Main Road Bus Lanes - Substantial transit improvement; Most potential for pedestrian and safety improvements; Balances local vehicle access and thru vehicle traffic

tool_args.label: Chosen concept summary
tool_args.raw_text: 1 Main road bus lanes improve bus speed and reliability; no conflicts with turning vehicles or parking 2 High-quality median bus stations for all buses (SBS, Local, and Express) 3 Medians shorten pedestrian crossing distances, provide refuges, and add greenery to the corridor 4 Calm service roads for parking, deliveries, and local access trips 5 Main roadway for thru vehicle trips 6 Consistent roadway design for the entire corridor improves navigability

payload.claim_text: 1. Main road bus lanes improve bus speed and reliability; no conflicts with turning vehicles or parking 2. High-quality median bus stations for all buses (SBS, Local, and Express) 3. Medians shorten pedestrian crossing distances, provide refuges, and add greenery to the corridor 4. Calm service roads for parking, deliveries, and local access trips 5. Main roadway for thru vehicle trips 6. Consistent roadway design for the entire corridor improves navigability

tool_args.raw_text: Vision Zero Priority Corridor Since 2009 on Woodhaven & Cross Bay Blvds

payload.claim_text: Vision Zero Priority Corridor Since 2009 on Woodhaven & Cross Bay Blvds

tool_args.label: SBS route changes from LTD
tool_args.raw_text: The SBS will use the viaduct over Atlantic Av (local bus will use service roads to access Atlantic Av) - Q52 extension is under consideration

payload.claim_text: The SBS will use the viaduct over Atlantic Av (local bus will use service roads to access Atlantic Av). Q52 extension is under consideration.

tool_args.label: SBS stop changes from LTD
tool_args.raw_text: SBS stops at 91 Av instead of Atlantic Av (local bus will still stop at Atlantic Av) - New stop at 101 Av - New stop at Pitkin Av - Broad Channel and Rockaway stops to be discussed at upcoming workshop

payload.claim_text: SBS stops at 91 Av instead of Atlantic Av (local bus will still stop at Atlantic Av). New stop at 101 Av. New stop at Pitkin Av. Broad Channel and Rockaway stops to be discussed at upcoming workshop.
